c3_chirality_boundary.statement: C3 boundary torsion (Z/3Z) cannot conserve chirality (Z/2Z) across the neutrino capture event. gcd(3,2)=1 — the homomorphism is trivial. The C3 face holds phase, not chirality. The residual orphaned Z/2Z degree of freedom propagates as a boundary anomaly.

quadratic_inversion.statement: The C1 spatial envelope undergoes energetic bankruptcy at the first discrete tick n* = ⌈√(ε₀·d_local / αγ)⌉ where mediation cost M(n) = αγ·n² strictly exceeds anchor energy E_anchor = ε₀·d_local. Two co-linear linear growth terms (phase mismatch Δφ=αn and basis-swap β=γn) force O(n²) mediation cost explosion.

mobius_flip_bosonic.statement: A massless C1 field completing its 360° cycle resolves the double-spend coordinate collision via orientation-reversing homeomorphism f(v,θ)=(v,θ+π), mapping φ(v_n)=-φ(v_0). New adjacency space is created by edge re-labeling with reversed orientation parity — not by coordinate displacement. No vertical structural tilt required.

fermionic_torsion_minimum.statement: A mass-bearing C2/C3 node requires minimum torsion τ_min = ε/2π to execute the 720° SU(2) closure without self-intersection. Derived from helical clearance condition 4πτ ≥ 2ε on the fiber bundle π: SU(2) → SO(3). Massless Möbius flip is insufficient — the finite tube radius ε forces geometric clearance of the origin index point.

topological_scar_memory.statement: The scar is not a state — it is a deformation of the threshold manifold itself. Scarred dispersal threshold: C_disp(N_prev) = C_disp⁰·[1 + Σδᵢ·e^(-λ(t-tᵢ))]. Irreducible topological remainder ε_residual > 0 persists permanently — the threshold never recovers to virgin state. Each bankruptcy event imprints failure vector α_k = (φ_k, θ_k, ψ_k) ∈ S²×ℝ⁺ encoding which bond axis failed first.

thermodynamic_geometric_friction.statement: Thermodynamic heat is exclusively geometric friction from a non-geodesic basis-swap path. The C2 reflection det(Φ_C2)=-1 reverses orientation on the simplex — topologically irreducible holonomy defect ε_residual = ∮∂σ²(A_before - A_after)·dl ≠ 0. The swap traverses a diagonal crossing of the simplex interior with no corresponding edge in G, generating action cost δS_friction = ∫g_ij(q)dqⁱ∧dqʲ over the non-simplicial path.

true_lock_crystallisation.statement: C3 true-lock requires: (1) Σφ(i) ≡ 0 (mod 3) across face vertices, (2) cycle rank β₁(F)=1, (3) discrete holonomy h(i,j)=φ(j)-φ(i)≡1 (mod 3) on all directed edges — enforcing Z/3Z parallel transport with h_total=3≡0 (mod 3). True-lock carries topologically protected winding number w=1 ∈ π₁(Z/3Z). False crystallisation occurs when phase assignment violates the mod-3 sum — non-integer resonance shatters back to C2 fluid.

chiral_scattering_matrix.statement: Chiral scattering at the C2/C3 boundary: a C1 wave with Z/2Z polarization attempting basis-swap with a Z/3Z core finds only the trivial homomorphism (gcd(2,3)=1) — image collapses to identity coset, zero information transfer. Scattering matrix S on H_∂ = H_in ⊕ H_ref ⊕ H_trans yields full reflection of Z/2Z modes. Charge is geometric scattering, not expulsion. Forces are routing failures.

causal_sink_graph_saturation.statement: A black hole is a full node. Graph saturation at deg_max(v0)=12 (the kissing number for 3D space) creates a Causal Sink: incoming phase information Δφ(u,τ)→v0 = ∅ — not reflected, not stored, structurally annihilated. The Klein bottle fold point is a self-referential edge attempting to embed into its own adjacency slot. Gravity is not a force; it is a No Vacancy sign at the fundamental scale of reality.
